name: Marinated Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and chop the French-style green beans.
2. Cut the pimentos into small pieces.
3. Slice the onions into rings.
4. Chop the celery finely.
5. Remove corn kernels from Shoe Peg corn can.
6. Rinse and drain the green peas.
7. Mix the dressing ingredients in a saucepan: vegetable oil, salt, pepper, red wine vinegar, and sugar.
8. Bring the mixture to a boil and stir until the sugar dissolves completely.
9. Pour the cooled dressing over the chopped vegetables.
